primary_concern: Sepsis with multi-organ dysfunction and acute kidney injury
clinical_summary: Elevated lactate (4.2 mmol/L) combined with leukocytosis (14.2 K/uL), thrombocytopenia (88-95 K/uL), and anemia (9.8 g/dL) meet Sepsis-3 criteria for sepsis risk. Bilirubin elevation (1.4 mg/dL) and progressive AKI (Stage 1 to Stage 3) suggest organ hypoperfusion. Platelets remain below 100 K/uL across three measurements, meeting SOFA coagulation criteria.

prioritized_risks.explanation: Lactate >2 mmol/L, WBC >12 K/uL, and thrombocytopenia meet Sepsis-3 criteria for suspected infection plus SOFA increase ≥2
prioritized_risks.threshold: Suspected infection plus acute SOFA increase ≥2

prioritized_risks.explanation: Creatinine elevation from baseline with AKI Stage 3 (8.9 mg/dL) meets KDIGO criteria for acute kidney injury
prioritized_risks.threshold: Creatinine rise ≥0.3 mg/dL in 48h or ≥1.5x baseline in 7d

prioritized_risks.explanation: Platelets <100 K/uL meets SOFA coagulation scoring threshold for organ dysfunction
Lactate >2 mmol/L present but no evidence of vasopressor-dependent hypotension or fluid-refractory shock
prioritized_risks.threshold: Vasopressor-dependent MAP ≥65 mmHg with lactate >2 mmol/L after fluids

recommended_actions: Initiate broad-spectrum antibiotics per local sepsis protocol
Obtain blood cultures and infection source investigation
Start crystalloid resuscitation per sepsis bundle
Consult nephrology for AKI Stage 3 management
Consider platelet transfusion if thrombocytopenia <50 K/uL with bleeding risk
Recheck lactate and base deficit to monitor response to resuscitation
doctor_handoff: Review for hypotension requiring vasopressors to confirm septic shock. Evaluate for central line placement and SOFA score trends. Prioritize imaging for potential infection source.

disease_progression.observation: Initial sepsis markers: WBC 14.2 K/uL, Hgb 9.8 g/dL, Bilirubin 1.4 mg/dL
AKI Stage 1 (Cr 2.1 mg/dL) with platelets 95 K/uL
AKI Stage 3 (Cr 8.9 mg/dL) with platelets 88 K/uL and lactate 4.2 mmol/L

excluded_outliers.reason: Rapid change detected — Creatinine changed by 6.5 mg/dL within 6.0h (max allowed: 2.0). Probable measurement error or specimen issue. Section 15.2 — rise > 2.0 mg/dL in < 6h.
